description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a wide, flat base and two long, rounded handles attached at the top, suitable for carrying by hand or over the shoulder. The main panels are adorned with a blue and gray geometric pattern resembling traditional woven textile designs, giving it a sophisticated and urban look. The sides of the bag are solid dark blue or black, providing contrast to the patterned front and back. A small black tab is visible on one side, likely part of the closure mechanism. The bag appears to be made primarily of fabric, possibly canvas or a synthetic textile, with reinforced edges and handles for durability. The overall construction suggests a spacious interior, ideal for carrying personal items in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular handbag with blue geometric patterned panels, dark solid sides, and two long handles, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid dark panel and the narrow profile of the handbag, with both handles visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full blue geometric patterned panel and both handles, with a small black tab on the left edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the solid dark panel and a slight crease or fold in the fabric.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the same blue geometric pattern as the front, with both handles visible and no tab on the edge.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, rounded handles suitable for hand or shoulder carry; non-adjustable and attached at the top edges.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Tab closure, likely with a zipper or magnetic snap, located at the top center with a small black tab visible on one side.
attribute_pattern: Blue and gray geometric pattern resembling woven textile designs on the main panels.
